arts.ttl: Liverpool’s Arne Slot Takes Scathing Shot at Arsenal, Real Madrid With PSG Claim
arts.sum: Liverpool play in arguably the best league in the world and had quality matches in the UEFA Champions League this 2024-25 season, such as Real Madrid. Nonetheless, manager Arne Slot threw shade against all these clubs with his latest claim. The Reds were in a tightly contested Premier League title race with Arsenal and have […] The post Liverpool’s Arne Slot Takes Scathing Shot at Arsenal, Real Madrid With PSG Claim appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Paris Saint-Germain are giving him sleepless nights and insists Liverpool must up their game to progress in Champions League
arts.sum: Arne Slot says he is having sleepless nights ahead of the visit of PSG and insists Liverpool must put in their performance of the season to progress in the Champions League last-16 second leg.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool plotting move for ‘superb’ Premier League player praised by Guardiola
arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on the Premier League title as they sit on top of the table, 15 points ahead of 2nd placed Arsenal. They are also in the League Cup final, with a clash against Newcastle scheduled to be played at Wembley coming Sunday. In the Champions League, they have a slender 1-0 lead […] The post Report: Liverpool plotting move for ‘superb’ Premier League player praised by Guardiola appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. PSG: Five Reds risk Champions League ban as Arne Slot faces nightmare scenario
arts.sum: Five Liverpool players run the risk of being banned for the first leg of the Champions League quarter-finals if they pick up yellow cards in Tuesday's clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: Slot: We'll need best performance of season to knock out 'complete' PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot admits his side will have to produce their best performance of the season to ensure Champions League progress against "the most complete team we have faced".

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Hinds subjected to 'sexually inappropriate comments'
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Taylor Hinds says she is "determined to make a stand" after being subjected to "sexually inappropriate comments" from a fan.

arts.ttl: I'm glad Arne Slot exploded at Liverpool stars - I was a nutter but Darwin Nunez needs to be careful
arts.sum: John Aldridge looks at Liverpool's win over Southampton and Darwin Nunez's performance in his weekly ECHO column

arts.ttl: Man City, Man Utd Receive Red Flag Warning on €55M-Rated Star Who PSG Still Have Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain initially opted for a short-term solution by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season. However, his future is now somewhat settled, as the German club has secured him on a permanent transfer. Nonetheless, PSG might have dodged a frustrating situation as a new report reveals Simons’ attitude at Leipzig. arts.ttl: PSG leave Arne Slot with sleepless nights as Liverpool boss offers spiky Arsenal response
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Paris Saint-German at Anfield on Tuesday night looking to maintain their Champions League advantage to secure a place in the competition's quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits he's changed his mind about 'angry and frustrated' Liverpool star
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has admitted he's changed his mind about one of his star players who has stepped up to the plate in a big way over the last week
